Luiz E. Hupalo

R&D Researcher

About

🎓 M.Sc. in Communications and Signal Processing at Universidade Federal de Santa Catarina (2023)
🔎 R&D Researcher at Instituto Nacional de Telecomunicações
🔭 O-RAN, 5G, Self-Organizing Networks, and NS-3 simulations
👯 I’m looking to collaborate on the future wireless networks
🌱 I’m currently researching on how to leverage Reinforcement Learning to optimize traffic in 5G networks
⚙️ Working to build and deploy models through xApps in the near-RT RIC

Research

Masters Thesis

"Physical Layer Network Slicing for eMBB and mMTC with Distributed Power Allocation"

Technique to adapt the transmission power of the mMTC devices in the uplink in a decentralized fashion, without the need of coordination between BS and UE. Roughly speaking, this is done through the creation of “clusters” of the received SNR seen at the BS, i.e., by adapting the mMTC device transmission power we can artificially create more than one SNR mean seen at the BS.

Undergraduation Thesis

"Modelos aproximados para predição de variáveis de poços de petróleo"

Use of autoregressive linear models based on systems identification to predict the short term values of the production of oil wells from simulated reseirvoirs. The simulations were performed through the MRST (SINTEF).
